themes.label: Wisdom
themes.summary: This chapter points toward wisdom, understanding, discernment, counsel, or instruction. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And Joshua the son of Nun was full of the spirit of wisdom; for Moses had laid his hands upon...". Word-study detail reinforces "חָכְמָ֔ה: of wisdom - wisdom (in a good sense)".

themes.label: Spirit

themes.label: Suffering
themes.summary: This chapter deals with affliction, sorrow, trial, lament, endurance, or hardship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The children of Israel wept for Moses in the plains of Moab thirty days: so the days of weepi...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֵ֥בֶל: and mourning - lamentation".
